prompt_latex: How many ordered integer pairs $(x,y)$ satisfy $xy + 1x + 2y = 10$?
solution_latex: Add $2$ to both sides: $(x+2)(y+1)=12$. Each positive or negative divisor of $12$ gives one ordered pair, so there are $12$ pairs.
